title: Indulgent Creamy Venezuelan Almonds Gratin
description: A cozy, buttery almond gratin finished with a glossy caramelized top, perfect for a comforting dessert.
instructions: In a small saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat and whisk in the flour until a smooth roux forms.
Gradually stir in the almond milk and heavy cream, whisking constantly until the mixture thickens.
Add the brown sugar, salt, pepper, and cinnamon, and cook until the sauce is glossy and coats the back of a spoon.
Fold in the toasted almonds and grated parmesan, then pour the mixture into a greased 8x8 inch baking dish.
Spread the mixture evenly and sprinkle a thin layer of additional parmesan on top for a crisp glaze.
Bake for 20 minutes, then broil for 2-3 minutes until the top is golden brown and slightly caramelized.
Remove from oven and let the gratin rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve warm with a drizzle of almond milk sauce if desired.
